description: Style Note Designed keeping in mind the aesthetics of the trendsetting youth of today, this bracelet from revv is simple, smart and stylish. Crafted from steel, its shine does not diminish with time, while its classic design and colour combination allow you to pair it with a wide range of ensembles. Product Details Silver coloured bracelet with lobster clasp, golden and black coloured, stone encrusted bead detail Materials and Care Steel Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustSizeLenght: 21 cm
